message:
fix(dns): use thread-local test time and remove debug println

Convert TEST_NOW from a global AtomicU64 to a thread-local Cell<u64>
to prevent test interference when multiple resolver tests run in
parallel with different virtual time values. Remove the temporary
debug println left in the ambient wake timeout test.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
